meta_notes: 8AM rebuild on fresh 2026-07-12 extract (11:55Z) — replaces the 6:18 build made from the then-latest 07-10 extract. Stitch feed stale (2026-07-10T02:17Z, >48h): in-group signals primary; stale feed swept for the virality guarantee — its 13 surfaced items carry views/ages as of 07-10. News scan ran (3 searches): 1 verified item; late-June 'sunscreen causes cancer' Snopes debunk excluded (underlying story >7d).
menu_lines: doctors' 'never for my own kids' lists (19× · 1% · ♥) [watch](https://www.instagram.com/p/DalKr5PgSm1/)

themes.name: Skin-cancer-or-not 5-second quizzes
themes.receipt: 7 breakouts ≥100× from @dr.derm.love · 8.6M+ views across the run · two new this week still rising · caution: quizzes buy views, not follows (July study)

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Melanoma, sk, keloid #melanoma #skincancer #keloid

videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Bcc, dermatofibroma, melanoma #skincancer #melanoma #bcc #fyp

videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Skin tag, melanoma, seborrheic keratosis #melanoma #seborrheickeratosis #fyp

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Is it skin cancer or not? Melanoma, skin tag, melanoma #melanoma #skincancer #melanomaawareness

her_coverage.summary: Deep bench + active: BCC explainer 4d ago (317K IG), diagnosis-story prompt this week, BCC ultimate guide 493K YT, '3 skin-cancer facts' 185K TT

themes.corpus_position: When in doubt, get it checked out. Dermatologists use the ugly duckling sign to identify spots that are concerning for melanoma.

angles.angle: Launch her own 'cancer or not?' 3-lesion quiz series
Quiz, then the tell: what gives each lesion away
Pair each quiz with a follow-up explainer — quizzes buy views, not follows

themes.name: Glass-skin routines & drinkable-collagen wave
themes.receipt: HER WIN leads — superviral both platforms (2.8M · ♥ gold) · @yurileeeee's gummies 1% breakout + olive-oil 'filter routine' + PDRN misting ≈ 6.5M combined, 2.7–6.7d

videos.author: drabby6
videos.caption: And don’t forget to exfoliate 1-2 times a week! Don’t use a retinoid when pregnant. What's your glass skin care routine? #glassskin #skincare #skincareroutine

videos.author: yurileeeee
videos.caption: The best tasting collagen🍓🥰 [Gelatin mixture] -Combine 1/4 cup beef gelatin& 1/2 cup room temp water [Maple syrup mixture] - Combine 1 cup maple syrup (honey is ok too), 1/2 cup water and 2 tsp vanill

videos.author: skincarewithyuri
videos.caption: Filter routine💕✨ -olive oil & lemon shot everyday -eat collagen rich foods -find skincare product works on your skin -increase blood circulation in anyways! #GlowUp #glow #filter #flawlessskin

videos.author: yurileeeee
videos.caption: Complements in Korea🇰🇷 hits different✨🥹@tokkionthemoon US purple rice aurora PDRN mist #glowyskin #glassskin #facemist #summermist

her_coverage.summary: Actively hers: this week's superviral pair (4.8d), the azelaic-tret-zinc 'trifecta' 12d ago (75K TT + 126K IG), glass-skin hacks 485K TT

themes.corpus_position: Systematic reviews show collagen supplements do help the appearance of your skin — particularly fish- and porcine-derived. But protein is protein; I'd like to see collagen compared to just a high-protein diet.

angles.angle: Part 2 of her glass-skin format: acne-prone edition
React to gummies: gelatin IS collagen — the nuance
Olive-oil-and-lemon shots for skin: her verdict

themes.name: Doctors-as-insiders: 'never for my kids' + worth-every-penny tier lists
themes.receipt: 4 creators, one pattern — doctors' personal judgments: @teawithmd 1% ♥ (1.1M, Part 2 out) · @dermguru ♥ (1.2M) · @drgeria 102× ♥ · @jillian.gottlieb panel SV at 1 day · ≈4M combined

videos.author: teawithmd
videos.caption: You ask a room full of doctors one question: What's something you'd never let your own kids do? Let's just say... the answers did not disappoint. And that last one there might be a little TOO honest 👀

videos.author: drgeria
videos.caption: If you’re gonna spend it, make it worth it! 🌟 #dermatology #dermatologist #spending

her_coverage.summary: The format is proven HERS: hair-loss ratings 1.9M TT, '3 things I'd never do in winter' 1.3M TT, bad-better-best stretch marks 7d ago (130K IG)

themes.corpus_position: Minoxidil: 10 out of 10. Biotin: zero out of 10 — it doesn't help unless you're biotin deficient, and it can mess up how your labs look.

angles.angle: Her list: what a Mohs surgeon never lets her kids do
'Worth every penny': the products she actually buys
Next bad-better-best: sunscreens or scar care

themes.name: Sun-protection habits over products
themes.receipt: @beautydermmd 125× · 1% · ♥ (2.4M) · celebrity peg: Anne Hathaway (96× + a 6.7M civilian clip) · diaper-cream-≠-sunscreen myth-bust ♥ · civilian side: 15.9M diaper-cream sun demo = stitch #1

videos.author: beautydermmd
videos.caption: Not her serum. Not her skincare. HER HABITS. 👀 Sun protection is elite behavior. UPF clothing. Wide-brim hat. Sunglasses. Shade. This is what dermatologists notice first. You should too. ☀️ #dermatolo

videos.author: dermatologist_adel
videos.caption: beautmaxxing non-negotiable 💁🏽‍♀️ the first step to getting Botox accusations 🤏🏽 #dermatologist #spf #beautymaxxing #skincareroutine #skincarehacks @larocheposay

videos.author: drdrayzday
videos.caption: Diaper rash cream is not sunscreen. Always look for sunscreens that are labeled broad spectrum and with a stated SPF value (ideally 30 or higher). Don’t assume the presence of high concentrations of z

her_coverage.summary: Her core lane: UV-index reminder 13d ago (169K IG), UPF/hat/shade guidance Oct 2025 (72K TT), 10.2M all-time UV-index hook

themes.corpus_position: You still need broad spectrum SPF, a hat, UPF clothing — and if you want bonus protection, polypodium supplements are clinically shown to boost your sun defense.
themes.winning_length: 6–8s habit montages; 160s myth explainer also working

angles.angle: Mohs surgeon's actual daily sun habits — show, don't tell
Myth-bust: zinc diaper cream is not sunscreen
React: Anne Hathaway's sun protection, surgeon's grade

more_topics.note: summer utility; technique caveats are her lane
playbook fact ready: tint blocks visible blue light

her_wins.summary: (IG/TT) Glass-skin 3-step went superviral on BOTH platforms — 1.5M TT (♥ gold · top-1% engagement) + 1.3M IG (♥ silver) = 2.8M in ~5d. A follower MAGNET, not just reach.
her_wins.open_lane: Extend, don't pivot: part 2 in the same 7s format (acne-prone/sensitive edition), then a glass-skin-mistakes variant; the caption's own question — 'what's your routine?' — is the community-prompt follow-up.

stitch_shortlist.author: @rob.lea1
stitch_shortlist.claim: Diaper cream, Zinka and Bag Balm to survive 11+ hours in open sun

pitch.the_claim: Zinc diaper cream + Zinka + Bag Balm = all-day outdoor sun protection
pitch.why_it_stitches: 15.9M views at ~3.8M/day (as of the 07-10 stitch extract — ~2d older now); civilian folk-practice demo, half-right: zinc oxide IS the mineral filter, but diaper cream and Bag Balm carry no SPF or broad-spectrum testing; punches sideways
pitch.your_fit: Her corpus uses diaper cream as BARRIER repair ('you can use just everyday diaper cream' — microneedling guide; zinc-based barrier on tretinoin nights) and the playbook holds her sunscreen line: broad-spectrum SPF 30+, UVA penetrates glass. The 'is diaper cream sunscreen?' call is the teachable gap.
angles: half-right: zinc oxide is THE mineral filter — but diaper cream isn't broad-spectrum tested
'you want me to wear WHAT?' — grade Zinka vs Bag Balm vs actual SPF
empathy-first: 11 hours outside is real — the surgeon's version of that kit

angles: half-right: gelatin IS collagen — here's what the reviews actually say
grade the recipe: the maple-syrup load is the catch (needs her take)
switch-don't-quit: cheaper protein does the same job

angles: grade each line: what helps, what's noise
'you want me to drink WHAT for glass skin?'
